headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Partners with Micron (MU), SK Hynix for Next-Gen Memory Development
summary: Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the best multibagger stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On March 11, Applied Materials announced strategic partnerships with Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) and SK Hynix to develop next-gen memory chips essential for AI and HPC. Both memory manufacturers will serve as founding partners at Applied Materials’ Equipment and […]
